description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and a mix of white and dark gray exterior finishes. The front facade includes a prominent entryway, a driveway leading to a covered garage, and a paved walkway. Large windows are visible on the side and rear, allowing for ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property is set on a rectangular plot with a manicured lawn and a paved road access. The structure appears to be two stories tall, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements. The overall look is sleek and functional, emphasizing geometric forms and open spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white and dark gray finishes, set on a rectangular lawn with a driveway and garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, garage, and a paved walkway leading to the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage entrance, side windows, and the extended lawn area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows and a patio area, with the lawn extending behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a mostly solid wall with minimal window openings and the driveway curving around the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, paved walkway, and integrated garage; minimalistic and functional design.
